scope: AgenC apply-patch parser, runtime primitive, and model-facing tool wrapper parity with the donor apply-patch subsystem.
sourceCommitDescribe: 35aaa5d9fc Bound websocket request sends with idle timeout (#20751)

requiredBehaviors: strict mode requires the begin and end patch markers
lenient mode unwraps EOF heredoc payloads before parsing
add, delete, update, move, context, and end-of-file chunks parse into ordered hunk data
invalid hunks report donor-shaped line-numbered parse errors
edgeCases: first update chunk may omit an explicit @@ marker
empty lines inside update chunks are treated as unchanged lines

requiredBehaviors: add hunks create missing parent directories and write full contents
delete hunks remove files and reject directory targets
update hunks locate expected old lines after optional context markers and write newline-terminated contents
move hunks write the destination and remove the source
success summaries list added, modified, then deleted paths
edgeCases: interleaved update chunks apply in descending replacement order
end-of-file additions prefer the file ending
trailing empty old-line sentinels are retried without the sentinel
ASCII patch text can match common typographic punctuation in source files

requiredBehaviors: JSON input accepts a single input string
raw/freeform callers can be adapted by the registry string-argument map
the Lark grammar is exported exactly for future freeform-capable providers
permission checks cover every affected patch path before execution
child-agent worktree invocations resolve relative patch paths against the child worktree
edgeCases: invalid patch input returns a tool error rather than mutating files
paths outside allowed roots are rejected by the runtime
